tb.t:
n. 结核, 肺结核, 结核病, 结核杆菌
[计] 太字节(万亿字节)
tb.d:
n a metallic element of the rare earth group; used in lasers; occurs in apatite and monazite and xenotime and ytterbite
n infection transmitted by inhalation or ingestion of tubercle bacilli and manifested in fever and small lesions (usually in the lungs but in various other parts of the body in acute stages)
n a unit of information equal to 1000 gigabits or 10^12 (1,000,000,000,000) bits
n a unit of information equal to 1000 gigabytes or 10^12 (1,000,000,000,000) bytes
n a unit of information equal to 1024 gibibytes or 2^40 (1,099,511,627,776) bytes
